Home › Lake County › Tavares › American Restaurants

American Restaurants in Tavares

The cleanest of Tavares's american restaurants is HARDEE'S #1500724, a perfect 100/100 at its last inspection. Here are all 7, each graded A–F so you can compare the kitchen, not just the menu.

7 american restaurants

  • A 100 H
    HARDEE'S #1500724 American ★ 3.9 (1513) Tavares · Lake County Veg Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 98 B
    BTW BURGERS TACOS WAFFLES American ★ 4.4 (1038) Tavares · Lake County Veg Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 92 C
    CHECKERS 6324 American ★ 3.4 (1271) Tavares · Lake County Inspected Mar 2026
  • C 71 H
    HURRICANE DOCKSIDE GRILL American ★ 4.3 (3960) Tavares · Lake County GFDF +2 more Inspected Aug 2025
  • D 65 L
    LAKE HARRIS HIDEAWAY American ★ 4.3 (2636) Tavares · Lake County Inspected Jun 2026
  • D 65 M
    MARY'S KOUNTRY KITCHEN American ★ 4.7 (1925) Tavares · Lake County Inspected Mar 2026
  • D 63 P
    PUDDLE JUMPERS American ★ 4.3 (2610) Tavares · Lake County VeganVeg +1 more Inspected Jan 2026
